data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for optional biz-triggered verification request events.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the presence of optional biz-triggered verification request events, but there is no evidence provided in the prior steps that confirms this requirement. While there are multiple passed steps related to bookings and compliance, none of them provide evidence of the required verification rows or the associated metadata. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence provided for the requirement, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of optional biz-triggered verification request events.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
